name: Peach Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Nabisco Sugar Wafer, 10 oz crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush wafers and place a layer in the bottom of a large cake pan. Save some to sprinkle on top.
2. Beat egg whites until stiff and set aside. Cream butter with powdered sugar and egg yolks separately.
3. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the butter mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture over the crushed wafers.
5. Slice fresh peaches and place them on top.
6. Refrigerate for at least 8-10 hours before serving to allow flavors to meld.
